name: grok-bitch
description: A Rick & Morty multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code, built on a deterministic safety cage. Offload mechanical, verifiable grunt work to grok (grok-build) — it runs caged (OS sandbox, hard resource caps, byte-snapshot guard+revert on protected paths, a verify gate) and hands back a structured JSON verdict; falls back to a caged Opus when grok is unavailable. Claude keeps the rigor; grok does the bitch work. Ships a skill (so Claude reaches for it automatically), a 12-strong persona cast of subagents (Rick the 300-IQ handler, Morty the grunt courier, Mr. Meeseeks, Jerry, Citadel Rick, Beth, Space Beth, Summer, Birdperson, Mr. Poopybutthole, Evil Morty the directed red-teamer, Randotron the seeded-chaos fuzzer — each with show-accurate skills and a style-accurate model tier), three session modes (/rick-mode to become Rick, /adventure-mode to run a goal as a multi-agent Workflow, /family-mode for a standing ensemble), and the grok-bitch CLI on PATH. The voice is paint; the rigor underneath is surgical — maniac in the prose, surgeon in the facts.
